question: Why did our snack-bar SKU mix drop 14% of expected lift during the back-to-school promo in the Mid-Atlantic, while the Midwest hit target?
metric_label: Promo lift by SKU, region, and week
target_grain: one row per (sku_id, promo_id, region, week_start_date)

upstream_models.description: Point-of-sale velocity from Walmart Retail Link, Target Partners Online, and Kroger Vendor Portal via Fivetran. Includes units_sold, baseline_units, and promo_flag by store-sku-day.
Unified promotional calendar from SAP TPM and retailer confirmation portals. Carries planned_lift_pct, display_type, signage_confirmed, and execution_window dates.
Retailer execution audit data — endcap compliance, display setup date, signage_live_date, and store_region. Sourced from Syndicated Panel and retailer portals via Fivetran.
SKU master with category, subcategory, brand, and pack configuration. Sourced from SAP S/4HANA product master via Fivetran connector.
